comments.post_body:
In Testars Quarter our Weekends are for Learning.🎉 Are you ready 🙋‍♀️ 

Join our community today 👉  www.testarsquarter.com

This Saturday we are hosting a Full-Stack Software Engineer from Microsoft. 

You cannot afford to miss this one! 📌 

Topic: Maximizing the Use of Azure For Testers

Date: November 2nd, 2024
Time: 11AM -12 PM
Venue: www.testarsquarter.com
Speaker: Samson Alajede
Moderator:Faith Ibitoye

See you there!
#learnathorn
#techiesmeettestars hashtag
#testarsquarter hashtag
#techangout hashtag
#tech hashtag
#product hashtag
#testing
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to an announcement about an upcoming learning event at Testars Quarter, where a Microsoft Full-Stack Software Engineer will discuss maximizing the use of Azure for testers. The event is scheduled for November 2nd, 2024, and the commenter is likely expressing interest or excitement about the opportunity to learn from the speaker.

comments.post_body:
I need your help. We're adding a product designer to our team Talstack.

Please tag someone you know who is a bad-ass product designer with 5-10 years experience based in Nigeria (or elsewhere in Africa). Even if they're not looking, tag them anyway as there's no harm in connecting anyway :).

We're primarily focused on people who have designed intuitive, user-friendly products that are being used by paying users (not designing as a hobby or for a master's degree).

Reminder to tag some of the most brilliant product designers you know in the comments + share links to their portfolios if you can! 🙏
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a job posting for a product designer at Talstack, seeking referrals for experienced designers based in Africa, and is asking their network to tag potential candidates. The ideal candidate should have 5-10 years of experience designing user-friendly products with paying users.

comments.post_body: Congratulations  my genius son Qais Al Hajri  for winning the FY21 #microsoft  Windows & Devices Oar Award, a recognition awarded for exemplary collaboration and teamwork.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating Qais Al Hajri on winning the FY21 Microsoft Windows & Devices Oar Award for exemplary collaboration and teamwork. The award is a recognition of Qais' outstanding efforts and achievements in the field.

The original post is celebrating Qais Al Hajri's achievement and the commenter is echoing this sentiment.
